_comment: Cave World (洞府界) dimension type — the sealed artificial realm. Has a ceiling (the sky barrier seal), dim ambient light (the seal dims the sky), and end-like floating island generation (the space between planets is fragmented void). Natural=false because this is an artificial realm, not a natural world. Bed works because cultivators can establish dwellings. No raids. The ambient_light is 0.1 (very dim — the seal suppresses natural light). logical_height=256 (compressed compared to a real planet). The effects are 'minecraft:the_end' because the Cave World's inter-planetary space feels end-like: dark sky, floating islands of spiritual energy, no sun.
